description: Machine-readable formal invariant coverage with risk weighting. Tracks TLA+ invariant → Rust assertion → test → CI coverage with severity scoring.

schema.criticality: 0.0-1.0: how catastrophic is failure (1.0 = data corruption/deadlock)
schema.confidence: 0.0-1.0: how well do we understand this invariant (1.0 = fully proven, 0.5 = partially modeled)
schema.coverage_weight: 0.0-1.0: what fraction of risk is mitigated by tests (1.0 = fully tested, 0.0 = no tests)

invariants.rust_enforcement: Atomic pre-check + add_edge inside Mutex. debug_assert_no_cycle in debug.

invariants.tla_note: Model proves separate check+commit creates cycle. VIOLATED=expected.
invariants.rust_enforcement: Atomic pre-check + add_edge inside single Mutex critical section
invariants.failure_severity: TOCTOU deadlock — race condition between check and commit
invariants.note: confidence 0.95: TLA+ proves TOCTOU exists, Rust proves atomicity fixes it

invariants.tla_note: Unified MVCC + Wait-For, atomic check+commit, no write conflicts
invariants.rust_enforcement: try_wait_edge for all lock acquisitions during transaction commit
invariants.failure_severity: data corruption — lost writes or inconsistent reads
invariants.note: confidence 0.8: TLA+ model may not fully capture commit ordering. coverage_weight 0.5: only 1 of several paths tested

invariants.tla_note: Model proves separate commit-check + commit-write creates TOCTOU window. VIOLATED=expected.
invariants.rust_enforcement: Guarded by try_wait_edge atomicity (Rust impl is atomic)
invariants.failure_severity: MVCC TOCTOU deadlock — concurrent commits create cycle
invariants.note: risk_score ≈ 0: Rust atomicity is validated by INV_NO_DEADLOCK_TOCTOU

invariants.tla_note: Write skew counterexample exists. Current MVCC allows it.
invariants.failure_severity: data inconsistency — two transactions read overlapping data, write different values, commit both (serializability violation)
invariants.note: FROZEN — known unsafe area. Deferred to Phase C. risk_score = 0 because coverage_weight = 0.

invariants.rust_enforcement: Version chain read snapshot isolation (partial — no commitTs ordering)
invariants.failure_severity: non-serializable reads — stale/mixed data from concurrent txns
invariants.note: confidence 0.7: SSI model exists but commitTs semantics incomplete

invariants.tla_note: No two transactions can commit writes to the same key at overlapping times
invariants.rust_enforcement: Write-write conflict detection in CommitTxn path (NOT fully tested)
invariants.failure_severity: lost update — concurrent writes to same key, last commit wins
invariants.note: CRITICAL GAP: no tests exercise CommitTxn write-write validation

invariants.tla_note: Dafny-verified B+Tree structural invariants (balance, search, range)
invariants.rust_enforcement: Dafny proof — no runtime Rust assertion. Rust std BTreeMap used.
invariants.failure_severity: index corruption — wrong data returned or panic on corrupt tree
invariants.note: Dafny proof validates model, not Rust implementation. Rust std library assumed correct.
